infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is used to enable Tap to Pay and nearby card readers for in-person payments.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Bluetooth is used to connect to Stripe Terminal card readers.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Bluetooth is used to connect to Stripe Terminal card readers.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Local network access is used to discover Stripe Terminal readers.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow ServiceOS to use the microphone to capture voice actions.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow ServiceOS to use your location to enable Tap to Pay and card readers.
plugins.bluetoothPeripheralPermission: Allow ServiceOS to connect to Stripe Terminal card readers.
plugins.bluetoothAlwaysUsagePermission: Allow ServiceOS to connect to Stripe Terminal card readers.
plugins.localNetworkUsagePermission: Allow ServiceOS to discover Stripe Terminal readers on your network.
